reasoning: Read launcher.py L28-71. launch_with_npx starts the child via subprocess.Popen (L43-50) and collects the exit code via self.process.wait() (L58). CalledProcessError is never raised by Popen or Popen.wait() — it is raised only by the check=True family. So the except subprocess.CalledProcessError block (L64-66) can never fire on this path: real dead code, concretely removable. The claim is accurate and correctly limited to npx (the docker path at L101 does use check=True, making its analogous handler live).
